scripts.db:triggers: docker exec -i prosync-postgres-1 psql -U prosync -d erp_db < drizzle/custom/0001_triggers.sql
scripts.db:add-plan-fields: docker exec -i prosync-postgres-1 psql -U prosync -d erp_db < drizzle/custom/0002_add_plan_fields.sql
scripts.db:custom: docker exec -i prosync-postgres-1 psql -U prosync -d erp_db < drizzle/custom/0001_triggers.sql && docker exec -i prosync-postgres-1 psql -U prosync -d erp_db < drizzle/custom/0002_add_plan_fields.sql && docker exec -i prosync-postgres-1 psql -U prosync -d erp_db < drizzle/custom/0003_add_profile_completed.sql && docker exec -i prosync-postgres-1 psql -U prosync -d erp_db < drizzle/custom/0004_add_workflow_agency.sql && docker exec -i prosync-postgres-1 psql -U prosync -d erp_db < drizzle/custom/0005_add_notifications_assignments.sql && docker exec -i prosync-postgres-1 psql -U prosync -d erp_db < drizzle/custom/0006_add_profile_picture.sql && docker exec -i prosync-postgres-1 psql -U prosync -d erp_db < drizzle/custom/0007_update_bank_logos.sql
scripts.db:reset: docker exec -i prosync-postgres-1 psql -U prosync -d erp_db < drizzle/reset.sql && npm run db:push && npm run db:custom
